name: StraboMicro2 v2.0.14
notes:
## StraboMicro2 v2.0.14

### Bug Fixes
- Enforce 2000px minimum image width for all new micrographs
- Upscale small images in legacy projects to correct overlay positioning
- Prompt re-login when token expires instead of throwing Sentry error
- Normalize legacy geometryType case in web viewer SpotRenderer
- Prevent thumbnail race condition during concurrent processImage calls


---

### Downloads

| Platform | Download |
|----------|----------|
| macOS (Apple Silicon) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.14-arm64.dmg` |
| macOS (Intel) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.14.dmg` |
| Windows | `StraboMicro2 Setup 2.0.14.exe` |
| Linux (AppImage) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.14.AppImage` |
| Linux (Debian) | `strabomicro2_2.0.14_amd64.deb` |

### Installation

**macOS**: Download the DMG, open it, and drag StraboMicro2 to your Applications folder.

**Windows**: Download and run the installer. If you see a SmartScreen warning, click "More info" then "Run anyway".

**Linux (AppImage)**: Download the AppImage, make it executable (`chmod +x`), and run with: `./StraboMicro2-*.AppImage --no-sandbox`

**Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)**: Install the .deb package: `sudo dpkg -i strabomicro2_*.deb`

name: StraboMicro2 v2.0.11
notes:
## StraboMicro2 v2.0.11

### New Features
- Add server deployment files for web viewer
- Update DB populate endpoint to projectwithoutfile2 for new upload pipeline
- Add Samples/Groups/Spots/Tags tabs to web viewer sidebar
- Switch web viewer to MUI with desktop app's exact theme and component styling
- Add web viewer associated image overlay rendering with LOD strategy
- Add web viewer header, breadcrumbs, scale bar, and cursor location
- Add web viewer sketch layer rendering
- Add web viewer project tree with hierarchical dataset/sample/micrograph navigation
- Add web viewer properties panel with metadata, StraboTools, and project tabs
- Add web viewer metadata formatting utilities and MetadataSummary component
- Add web viewer foundation: expanded types, theme, UI primitives
- Add web viewer POC with tiled image rendering
- Update .smz export/import to include tile pyramids
- Show loading indicator when switching to a recent project
- Add StraboTools results display in Properties Panel
- Implement Save as Sibling and Replace Original with full-resolution processing
- Add StraboTools data model, main process algorithms, and IPC handlers
- Implement Mode Tool K-means phase segmentation
- Implement Color Index tool with global/adaptive thresholding
- Implement Edge Fabric eigenvalue analysis with ellipse overlay
- Implement Sobel infrastructure and Edge Detect tool
- Add StraboTools dialog shell with micrograph selector and IPC wiring

### Bug Fixes
- Generate medium.jpg for images smaller than 2048px
- Suppress MUI out-of-range Select warnings during project switch
- Clear stale micrograph selection synchronously when options rebuild
- Validate micrograph belongs to current project before loading in StraboTools
- Clear prevProjectIdRef on dialog close to prevent false project-change detection
- Reset dialog state when project switches while StraboTools or Image Comparator is open
- Resolve web viewer main-thread lockup caused by Konva hit detection
- Update SMZ and Share URLs to use project_id parameter
- Revert DB populate endpoint back to projectwithoutfile
- Use Konva click event for spot deselection instead of mouseUp
- Use ref for hasDragged to fix stale closure causing double-click to deselect
- Debounce LOD switching to prevent UI lockup during rapid zoom
- Suppress overlay click during pan/drag
- Update Share button to link to /share_micro_file?u=<projectId>
- Update SMZ download URL to /download_smz_file?u=<projectId>
- Add app icon and match desktop header font styling
- Add medium image LOD — show seamless 2048px image when zoomed out, tiles only when zoomed in
- Revert to KonvaImage tiles with +1 overlap and perfectDrawEnabled=false
- Eliminate tile seams by drawing all tiles in a single canvas Shape
- Increase tile overlap to 2px to eliminate visible seams
- Always show breadcrumbs bar to prevent layout shift
- Spot selection: highlight from external click, deselect on empty canvas click
- Replace flat spots list with hierarchical Sample → Micrograph → Spot tree matching desktop
- Overlay opacity treated as 0-1 scale (not 0-100 like spots)
- Hide default zero lat/lon values in sample metadata panel
- Eliminate composite thumbnail race condition by capturing project state immediately
- Dispatch thumbnail-generated events and regenerate parent thumbnails after save
- Force viewer reload and re-tile image after Replace Original
- Use crypto.randomUUID instead of ESM-only uuid package in main process
- Display Edge Fabric azimuth and axial ratio values using state instead of ref
- Use original color image as Edge Fabric background instead of Sobel magnitude
- Resolve aspect ratio distortion on first dialog open by reading container size directly


---

### Downloads

| Platform | Download |
|----------|----------|
| macOS (Apple Silicon) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.11-arm64.dmg` |
| macOS (Intel) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.11.dmg` |
| Windows | `StraboMicro2 Setup 2.0.11.exe` |
| Linux (AppImage) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.11.AppImage` |
| Linux (Debian) | `strabomicro2_2.0.11_amd64.deb` |

### Installation

**macOS**: Download the DMG, open it, and drag StraboMicro2 to your Applications folder.

**Windows**: Download and run the installer. If you see a SmartScreen warning, click "More info" then "Run anyway".

**Linux (AppImage)**: Download the AppImage, make it executable (`chmod +x`), and run with: `./StraboMicro2-*.AppImage --no-sandbox`

**Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)**: Install the .deb package: `sudo dpkg -i strabomicro2_*.deb`

- Replace flat spots list with hierarchical Sample → Micrograph → Spot tree matching desktop

name: StraboMicro2 v2.0.9
notes:
## StraboMicro2 v2.0.9

### New Features
- Persist grain size analysis spot selection across sessions

### Bug Fixes
- Restore grain analysis selection on session rehydration
- Sync grain analysis selection to project in-place in setters
- DOM nesting warning: Chip inside Typography
- Remove grain analysis selection from persist partialize
- Move grain analysis selection to top-level store state
